details.planned: remote-apply.sh creates a timestamped Compose override backup, a complete active base Mongo configuration backup, and a read-only release directory before API recreation

details.description: Production API after the public code-tool contract release and before the Agent progress ledger

change_summary.expected_result: Serial Agent tool loops stop after a repeated observable state, one strategy-change opportunity, and a second no-progress state instead of reaching recursionLimit=50. Warning, stop, and abort events produce bounded structured diagnostics. GPT and Fable state that image generation is unavailable and do not search for nonexistent image artifacts.
functions: Add a bounded in-memory progress ledger keyed by run_id to the common ON_TOOL_EXECUTE path
Fingerprint normalized tool results, errors, and artifact state without storing raw parameters or stdout
Append NO_PROGRESS_WARNING on the first repeated observation without artifact change
Return NO_PROGRESS_STOP after the allowed strategy action still reaches an observed state
Abort a later tool batch with a user-safe AgentNoProgressError before executing more tools
Emit structured diagnostics only for warning, stop, and abort transitions
Append an idempotent unsupported-image-generation contract to gpt-5.6-sol and claude-fable-5
Preserve the existing Bash, Read, and Skill compatibility normalizer
Preserve and package the deployed public code-tool contract
limitations: Parallel tool batches are recorded but do not trigger stop transitions in the first release
The ledger detects repeated observable state; it does not use fuzzy similarity or judge whether unique outputs are semantically useful
Ledger state is process-local with a 30-minute TTL and is not restored after an API worker restart
Complex file-task semantic progress remains owned by the independent File Agent Runtime after its separate production gate
This LibreChat product does not support generating new images; uploaded existing images remain supported
change_summary.reason: Conversation 435c96b0-4b32-4219-ac92-38755bda4cca repeatedly ran different directory-scan scripts while waiting for an image that had never been generated. The same observable file state recurred until LangGraph raised the recursion limit error at 50 steps. The failure pattern can also occur with repeated tool-not-found, missing-file, permission, polling, and artifact-verification states.
change_summary.risk: Enhanced Agent runtime and active base-config change. Incorrect fingerprinting could stop a legitimate repeated verification, while incorrect state cleanup could retain run metadata too long. The implementation uses exact canonical hashes, resets on new observations or artifact changes, bypasses runs without run_id, does not transition on parallel batches, applies strict TTL/LRU bounds, logs no raw content, locks the live API baseline hash, and recreates only LibreChat-API with exact Compose and Mongo rollback.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched Compose override and agent-progress-ledger Mongo backup created by remote-apply.sh, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify root, API config, CodeAPI health, normal GPT/Fable chat, and Office file reading

unresolved_issues: Production read-only preflight and live API baseline verification have not run
Production deployment and vip998 business acceptance are not approved or executed

validation_plan.command: node deployment/production-patches/2026-07-24-agent-progress-ledger/scripts/test-progress-ledger.js plus node --check, bash -n, git diff --check, and release-governance unittest discovery
validation_plan.expected: Repeated observations warn then stop, artifact progress resets the ledger, strategy changes recover, diagnostics contain hashes but no raw content, bounds and prompt idempotence pass, and release scripts are syntactically valid.
The live API index hash equals the recorded baseline, required services and rollback targets are healthy, and resource checks pass without changing production.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated vip998 serial repeated-state acceptance with at most one billable model request
validation_plan.expected: A bounded fixture reaches a repeated observation, receives the warning/stop contract before recursionLimit=50, preserves any existing files, and emits correlated structured diagnostics without raw file content.

validation_plan.command: Existing normal GPT/Fable and Office regression evidence plus targeted post-deploy smoke
validation_plan.expected: Normal chat, current-turn Office file reading, PPT/Excel modification, generated-file download cards, and the legacy tool alias normalizer remain functional.
